gist.headline: Daily News Update
gist.blurb: The hive's daily automated news and README update.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README and social media pipeline with the latest news and apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page and social feeds up to date with recent community activity.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and monitor robot organizing daily news clippings or updating a community bulletin board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot pinning pixelated news clippings to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
